sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99667" key="sundiadi/dwmi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνδια-δίδωμι</orth>, <sense id="n99667.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">absorb</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἔλαιον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0664.tlg001:147" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diocl.Fr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">147</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
